items.message: No new CI test failures detected. HEAD commit (b46be148b4a0c33ac654ae8e18740d668a3da2b4 — Search regeneration) has 0 failures across 1,001 check runs. Two transient failures were found on older commits: (1) a flaky eventhub load-balancing test timeout (1/1,387 tests, on a CODEOWNERS-only commit); (2) a batch-mgmt CI infrastructure failure (manifest generation error, 0/92 test failures). Neither failure is a code regression or persists on HEAD. The known-failures tracking issue #37864 lists no pre-existing failures. No GitHub issue needed.
